MINI MINUTES:
Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jan-28-2020 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Continued To Nov-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-26-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610.
